title: Customer Success Manager (m/w/d)
required_skills: B2B SaaS Customer Success / Account Management / Technical Consulting experience
matched_skills: German & English communication (English C1, German B1)
Analytical thinking — evidenced by KPI reporting, data storytelling, performance analytics
Structure & build mentality — PMO governance, SOP development, process documentation
B2B client management — Hapag-Lloyd CX, HSBC PMO, GRG Product Manager (partial match)
Cross-functional stakeholder coordination and product interface
missing_skills: Direct CSM / Customer Success Manager role experience in SaaS context
Technical API / JSON / data model knowledge
GRC systems knowledge or compliance-tech domain expertise
core_responsibilities: Onboard and implement new customers onto the Sustaind platform
Build Customer Success processes, playbooks, and documentation from scratch
Act as interface between customers and data engineering team (translate feedback)
Drive retention and expansion — identify upsell opportunities, secure contract renewals
Support customers with API/data export integration into GRC systems
culture_keywords: von Grund auf aufbauen (build from scratch)
recommended_emphasis: PMO process-building and documentation experience at HSBC (SOPs, governance frameworks, playbooks) — directly maps to building CS processes from scratch
Cross-functional coordination between product/engineering and stakeholders at Hapag-Lloyd and HSBC — mirrors the customer-to-product-team interface role
B2B client engagement and analytical reporting background (GRG, IPC, VfB Stuttgart KPI framework) — demonstrates account management and data-driven customer insight capabilities
